race.comment: CHICAGO KING (1) drifted back and never threatened when seventh last start over 1200m at Eagle Farm. Worth noting Boris Thornton goes aboard. Ideally placed and is sure to take plenty of stopping. KEEP IT LOKI (4) finished out of the money when fourth over 1650m at this track four weeks ago. Beautifully placed to play a major role. LENNYSTAR (8) has been in the market at her last couple of runs but failed to threaten, the latest effort a modest seventh at Sunshine Coast Poly over 1100m. Top-three chance on best figures. CHAYSE 'N' LEISA (2) did very well to fill a minor placing when resuming at this track but raced below expectations last time over 1300m at Toowoomba. Nicely placed to bounce back.
